author: Kawê Cezar

name: Gallery View Dashboard

releases.author: kawecz
releases.description:
## 🚀 Release v1.0.3 — Global Display Settings & Layout Polish

I am happy to push out **v1.0.3**, which focuses on extending global customization controls and hardening the live directory tree mechanics inside the plugin configuration panel. Here is a breakdown of what I've changed and introduced in this version:

![Gallery Plugin Demo](https://github.com/kawecz/gallery-view-dashboard/raw/main/public/gif.gif)

### 🌟 What's New

* **📊 Injected Folder Progress Bars Toggle Switch:** I added a new global display option to the configuration dashboard. When enabled, the plugin will recursively scan notes inside your directories and print visual completion bars if a frontmatter `checkbox` metadata key exists on your files.

### 🔧 Fixes & Optimizations

* **🛠️ Robust Vault Tree Resolution:** I refactored the underlying logic inside `displayFolderTree` to ensure that specifying nested directories (such as `conteudo` or custom deeply-nested structures) as your *Library Root Target Path* will no longer cause the configuration layout window to break or render blank containers.
* **✨ Production Layout Consistency:** I preserved the core filtering logic where your target root search path is cleanly treated as the top-level directory boundary, ensuring only the exact nested directories and native asset targets (like PDFs) populate your custom banner layout fields.
* **⚡ Smooth Interface Updates:** Cleaned up the input update logic to guarantee that toggling settings or changing paths triggers predictable interface rendering updates across active workspace leaves instantly.

---

### 📝 Core Settings Configuration Preview

```json
{
  "showFolderProgress": true,
  "visibleProperties": ["tags", "status", "todo"],
  "showCheckboxes": true
}

```

*Thank you for utilizing Gallery View! If you encounter any unexpected alignment issues with your custom banners, feel free to submit an issue or reach out directly.*
releases.name: Gallery View Dashboard 1.0.3

releases.author: kawecz
releases.description: ## 🚀 Release Notes: v1.0 .2 — Drag & Drop Lock + Smart Manual Sorting This update focuses entirely on improving user experience, adding more granular control over card sorting, and resolving unexpected layout jumps when switching view modes. ### 🆕 What's New * **🎯 Smart Baseline for Manual Sorting** * Switching from **Alphabetical** to **Manual Reorder** mode no longer scrambles your cards into an arbitrary, disorganized mess. * The layout now seamlessly initializes your manual grid using your current alphabetical order as a blueprint. You can then begin dragging cards around from a clean baseline. * **🔒 Functional Sorting Lock** * Introduced a persistent **Drag & Drop Lock** toggle directly next to the sorting method dropdown. * **Locked State (Default):** Prevents accidental drag actions while navigating folders. Cards behave like standard pointer links. * **Unlocked State:** Dynamically changes the cursor to a `grab` utility and activates card reordering. * **🧹 Streamlined View Controls** * Removed the buggy "Same as Folder" external plugin lookup option to maintain a cleaner, zero-dependency codebase that compiles with strict TypeScript type-safety. --- ### 🛠️ Behind the Scenes (Technical Tweaks) * **TypeScript Optimization:** Resolved compilation flow errors (`TS18048`) where nested closures tracking `savedOrder` states inside the sorting array could evaluate to an undefined state. * **Micro-Animations:** Injected a subtle programmatic shrink-and-pop scaling transition onto the lock action state bar to give the user immediate visual feedback when toggling interactive rules. --- *Thank you for using Gallery View! If you encounter any bugs or layout regressions, feel free to open an issue or pull request.*
releases.name: Gallery View Dashboard 1.0.2

releases.author: kawecz
releases.description:
v1.1.0 - Dynamic Card Layout & Responsive Image Support 🚀

This release completely re-engineers how library asset cards handle images across different viewport scales. Instead of locking image banners to static, hardcoded aspect ratios, the UI now dynamically adapts to the natural dimensions of your images while remaining completely responsive.

![Gallery Plugin Demo](https://github.com/kawecz/gallery-view-dashboard/raw/main/public/gif.gif)


🛠️ What's Changed
📐 Fully Dynamic Image-Driven Card Layout

    Removed restrictive fixed-height constraints (height: 140px) and absolute position overlays from the card asset covers.

    The image canvas wrapper now automatically calculates and adapts its height dynamically to the natural, intrinsic dimensions of your banner graphics.

    Masonry-style Desktop Alignment: In desktop viewports, cards maintain row consistency with clean min-content row tracks while giving images room to present their true dimensions without uneven stretching.

📱 Perfect Mobile Optimization

    Fixed an issue where high-width scaling on mobile screen viewports distorted or crushed card layouts.

    Implemented fluid mobile flex scaling, ensuring that cards up to max-width: 280px adapt cleanly, maintaining pristine graphic aspect ratios on smartphones and small panels.

💻 Technical File Adjustments Breakdown

    view.ts: Cleaned up element construction to strip inline positioning overrides, relying on clean stylesheets.

    styles.css:

        Reconfigured .gallery-view-grid to manage cards using a flexible Masonry approach via grid-auto-rows: min-content and align-items: start.

        Updated .gallery-view-card-banner-wrap and .gallery-view-banner-img to use fluid auto-height bounds.

        Added responsive @media view breakpoints to dynamically handle mobile display layout scaling.

📥 Installation / Update

    Download the updated main.js, manifest.json, and styles.css from this release.

    Replace the older assets inside your vault folder directory (.obsidian/plugins/your-plugin-id/).

    Reload or reactivate the plugin within Obsidian settings! Enjoy your beautiful, dynamic asset library gallery view.
releases.name: Gallery View Dashboard

releases.author: kawecz
releases.description:
📝 Release v1.0.0 - Official Initial Launch

We are thrilled to introduce Gallery View Dashboard, a powerful new way to visualize and navigate your Obsidian vault. This plugin transforms your directory structures into a streamlined, card-based interface, making your knowledge library more accessible and beautiful than ever before.

![Gallery Plugin Demo](https://github.com/kawecz/gallery-view-dashboard/raw/main/public/gif.gif)

✨ Key Features

    Visual Library Interface: Transform any vault folder into a beautiful, card-based dashboard with a single click.

    Hierarchical Navigation: Seamlessly browse between subfolders and files with an intuitive navigation system.

    Customizable Banners: Set unique banner images for folders and individual notes to personalize your dashboard.

    Live Settings Sync: Instant updates to your library structure—no need to reload the plugin when changing your root path.

    Smart Folder Suggestion: Easily configure your library paths with an integrated auto-complete suggestion system.

    Task Management: Toggle checkboxes directly from the gallery view to keep your workflows moving.

🐛 Improvements & Fixes

    Optimized rendering engine for faster performance when traversing deep folder trees.

    Fixed the folder override rendering logic to ensure a cleaner, isolated management experience.

    Resolved UI inconsistencies during dynamic path changes.

    Improved cross-platform compatibility for folder path handling.

🚀 How to Install

    Open Obsidian and go to Settings > Community Plugins.

    Ensure Restricted Mode is disabled.

    Click Browse and search for Gallery View Dashboard.

    Click Install and then Enable.

Built with care by [Kawê Cezar](https://github.com/kawecz). If you enjoy this plugin, consider giving the repository a star!
releases.name: Gallery View Dashboard 1.0.0
